headline: Master openEuler on Clouds
description: Learn to get openEuler images on AWS, Azure, and more with ease.

name: Obtaining the openEuler Image on AWS
description: Steps to find and use the openEuler community AMI on Amazon Web Services (AWS) EC2.

step.name: Log in to the AWS Console
step.text: Log in to the AWS Console at https://console.aws.amazon.com.

step.name: Navigate to EC2
step.text: Expand the Services tab, select Compute and then EC2.

step.name: Open AMI Catalog
step.text: In the Images list, choose AMI Catalog.

step.name: Search for openEuler
step.text: Choose Community AMIs and search for

step.name: Create a VM
step.text: Select an openEuler version to create a VM.

name: Obtaining the openEuler Shared Image on Azure
description: Steps to find and use the openEuler shared image on Microsoft Azure.

step.name: Log in to the Azure Portal
step.text: Log in to the Azure Portal at https://portal.azure.com/.

step.name: Search for Community images
step.text: Go to the account home page and search for

step.name: Find openEuler images
step.text: On the Community images page, search for

step.name: Create a VM
step.text: Click the target image and create a VM.

name: Obtaining the openEuler Image on Alibaba Cloud
description: Steps to find and use the openEuler community image on Alibaba Cloud Elastic Compute Service.

step.name: Log in to Alibaba Cloud Console
step.text: Log in to the Alibaba Cloud Console at https://cn.aliyun.com.

step.name: Navigate to Elastic Compute Service
step.text: Expand the Home tab and choose Elastic Compute Service.

step.name: Search for openEuler
step.text: In the Images list, choose Community Images, and search for

step.name: Create a VM
step.text: Select an openEuler version to create a VM.

name: Obtaining the openEuler Image on Huawei Cloud
description: Steps to create a cloud host (instance) on Huawei Cloud using the openEuler image.

step.name: Log in to HUAWEI CLOUD
step.text: Log in to the HUAWEI CLOUD website and click Console.

step.name: Buy and configure an ECS
step.text: Buy and configure an ECS, including configuring computing resources.
